modification: Added a third independent solution (SOLVE_MATH_THIRD_PROMPT) that uses a units-tracking and careful re-reading approach. Modified the SYNTHESIZE_MATH_PROMPT to accept three solutions (A, B, C) instead of two, enabling majority voting among three independent solutions. Updated the synthesizer's input to include solution3's response. This provides a tiebreaker when Solution A and B disagree, improving robustness through 3-way ensemble voting.
